vocab.meaning: minh chứng cho kỹ nghệ chế tác
vocab.example: For many, wearing a luxury timepiece is a testament to craftsmanship and an appreciation for fine engineering.

vocab.meaning: vẻ đẹp thanh lịch, không phô trương
vocab.example: A classic leather-strap watch adds a touch of understated elegance to any outfit without being overly flashy.

vocab.meaning: có ý thức về sự trôi qua của thời gian
vocab.example: Wearing a watch keeps me more mindful of the passing time, preventing me from getting lost in tedious tasks.

vocab.meaning: thuần túy mang tính thực dụng
vocab.example: While some see watches as fashion, my reason for wearing one is strictly utilitarian; I need to track my intervals during training.

vocab.meaning: tượng trưng cho một cột mốc trưởng thành
vocab.example: In some cultures, receiving a high-end watch can symbolize a rites of passage, marking a significant personal or professional milestone.
